query: Our model serves an internal analytics dashboard. About 3 analysts on our team use it day-to-day. We have a new version we want to roll out — should we canary it?
expected_behavior: Does NOT recommend a canary / traffic-split / multi-stage rollout workflow for a 3-user internal tool
Explains that canary rollouts require meaningful production traffic volume for statistical comparison; 3 users is far below any sensible cohort sample size
Recommends a lighter-weight alternative — a feature flag toggle plus manual analyst sign-off, and / or a documented rollback path — rather than the canary statistical machinery
